ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "record_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the transaction type (e.g., 16) */,
  "detail_type_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the transaction category (e.g., 399) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "funds_type" INTEGER /* Type of funds used (e.g., 0 for Immediate Availability) */,
  "bank_reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number provided by the bank (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was initiated */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., bank-to-bank transfer, wire transfer, online payment) */,
  "payer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payer (if applicable) */,
  "payee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payee (if applicable) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "exchange_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate used for the transaction (if applicable) */,
  "fees" TEXT /* Any fees associated with the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES transaction_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_record_code FOREIGN KEY ("record_code") REFERENCES record_codes ("record_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_detail_type_code FOREIGN KEY ("detail_type_code") REFERENCES detail_type_codes ("detail_type_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_funds_type FOREIGN KEY ("funds_type") REFERENCES funds_types ("funds_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_codes" (
  "record_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record code */,
  "record_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the record code */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the record code is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record code was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record code was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detail_type_codes" (
  "detail_type_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail type code */,
  "detail_type_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the transaction category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the detail type code */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the detail type code is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the detail type code was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the detail type code was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_type_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funds_types" (
  "funds_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funds type */,
  "funds_type" INTEGER /* Type of funds used (e.g., 0 for Immediate Availability) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funds type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the funds type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the funds type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the funds type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funds_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the transaction status is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, insert, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the change */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who made the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
